title: Ravike Prasanga
overview: Set in a village in Dhakshina Kannada, Sanvi, a beautiful 28-year-old fat girl wants to impress an NRI boy by wearing a saree with a fancy designer blouse. Will the blouse be stitched as per her choice? Will Sanvi get justice in the court?
